programme.desc: Two extinct Flummels (fluffy, rabbit-like creatures) are transported from 1835 to modern-day Shanghai. Animated fun.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: Struggling to adjust to their new lives, the Bad Guys are offered one last job by a group of all-female criminals.

programme.title: Smallfoot
programme.desc: An epic journey ensues when a Yeti named Migo stumbles across a real human being - but is banished from his snowy home when no-one believes him. With Channing Tatum.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Hotel Transylvania is the perfect place for monsters to escape the human world, until an unwitting hitchhiker tries to check in. Animated fun with the voice of Adam Sandler.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: After a shipwreck, an intelligent robot called Roz survives the harsh environments of an uninhabited island with the help of wild animals.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Dracula recruits his friends to help bring out the monster in his half human, half vampire grandson. Animated sequel with the voices of Adam Sandler and Andy Samberg.

programme.title: The Emoji Movie
programme.desc: Struggling to find his inner meh, multi-expressional livewire Gene embarks on a daring app-venture to find notorious hacker Jailbreak. Animation.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: Struggling to adjust to their new lives, the Bad Guys are offered one last job by a group of all-female criminals.

programme.title: Fox & Hare Save The Forest
programme.desc: Fox and Hare discover that Owl is missing. They set out with their friends to find him, but instead discover the mysterious lake. Animated adventure.

programme.title: Tom And Jerry Cowboy Up!
programme.desc: The duo head to the Wild West, where they team up up to help a cowgirl and her brother save their land. Animated fun.

programme.title: Deep Sea
programme.desc: When Shenxiu is called to the water by the monster from her dreams, she embarks on a mysterious journey to the deep sea - where secrets are hidden. Animated adventure.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane
programme.desc: Laura and her kooky sloth family move to the big city with their prized family recipe book and a rusted old food truck. Can they adapt to life in the fast lane.

programme.title: Boonie Bears: Guardian Code
programme.desc: Briar and Bramble lose their mother at an early age, but after a chance visit to the Robot Research Institute, answers are about to be revealed. Chinese animated adventure.

programme.title: Monster Family 2
programme.desc: The Wishbone Family are back, this time on a mission to save their friends from a monster hunter! Animated comedy with the voices of Nick Frost and Jason Isaacs.

programme.title: Riverdance: The Animated Adventure
programme.desc: A young boy and girl discover the mythical world of the Megaloceros Giganteus, who teach them to dance the Riverdance in celebration of life.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Alan reunite in Bangkok for another stag weekend, but having learned the lessons of their previous misadventures, resolve to keep this one quiet and alcohol-free. Things inevitably do not go according to plan, and they must once again piece together the events of a wild night they cannot remember. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Drinking buddies Phil and Stu try to help their troubled friend Alan get his life in order, only to stumble into another bizarre misadventure. The Mob have taken Alan's brother hostage and to free him, they have to track down manic gangster Mr Chow, who has escaped from a Thai prison. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms, Zach Galifianakis and John Goodman.

programme.title: So I Married an Axe Murderer
programme.desc: A poet has a history of ruining relationships owing to his paranoia, but when he meets the woman of his dreams, he resolves to make this romance last. However, as their wedding day approaches, he becomes convinced she is a notorious serial killer the police are hunting for. Comedy, starring Mike Myers and Nancy Travis.

programme.title: Mean Machine
programme.desc: A disgraced soccer star jailed for assaulting two policemen is persuaded by the prison authorities to form a football team of inmates to take on the guards. Unfortunately, whipping his fellow prisoners into shape proves a tricky proposition. Comedy drama, starring Vinnie Jones, Jason Statham, David Hemmings and Jason Flemyng.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A teenager is surprised when she is befriended by the girls in the most popular clique at her new school. However, a dating mishap leads to trouble and her supposed friends start to turn on her. Urged on by other pals outside their circle, the newcomer resolves to bring down the self-appointed queen of campus - only to end up adopting some of her rival's crueller characteristics. Comedy, with Lind

programme.title: Role Models
programme.desc: Two irresponsible salesmen find themselves in trouble with the law after crashing their truck. To avoid jail, they agree to undertake community service looking after a couple of troubled kids. However, it soon seems that going to prison would have been the easier option. Comedy, starring Paul Rudd, Seann William Scott and Christopher Mintz-Plasse.

programme.title: The Holiday
programme.desc: Two single women living on opposite sides of the Atlantic agree to exchange houses over the Christmas holidays. In their new surroundings, both women unexpectedly encounter prospective partners, but as the house swap draws to a close, difficult decisions have to be made about their blossoming relationships. Romantic comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Kate Winslet, Jack Black, Jude Law and Eli Wallach.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Four teenage lads make a solemn pact to lose their virginity before the high-school prom. Though their antics cause them huge embarrassment and public humiliation, the friends also learn about love and affection in their relations with the opposite sex. Coming-of-age comedy, starring Jason Biggs, Shannon Elizabeth, Chris Klein, Alyson Hannigan, Mena Suvari, Seann William Scott and Eugene Levy.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: Fast-talking Detroit cop Axel Foley heads for Los Angeles after an old friend is murdered before his eyes. His search for the killers leads him into conflict with a seemingly untouchable drug kingpin, but he also has to contend with the local force, who do not want him taking matters into his own hands. Comedy thriller, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Ronny Cox, John Ashton and Steven Berko

programme.title: American Pie 2
programme.desc: The teenagers reunite after their first year at college to spend the summer at a lake house. Jim is concerned by his lack of sexual experience, and goes in search of an old flame, Oz struggles to keep a long-term relationship going, and Finch tries to master the art of tantric sex. Comedy sequel, starring Jason Biggs, Chris Klein, Seann William Scott, Alyson Hannigan and Eugene Levy.

programme.title: The 40 Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: A middle-aged shop worker reveals he has never been intimate with a woman, which prompts his shocked colleagues to set him up with a series of potentially passionate dates. When he falls for a single mother, his friends think he is right on course for a lusty liaison, but his new partner is not ready for a physical relationship. Judd Apatow's comedy, starring Steve Carell, Catherine Keener and Pau

programme.title: Zoolander
programme.desc: Dim male model Derek Zoolander is stunned to find his career going downhill thanks to the arrival of an equally vacuous rival - but fails to realise he is merely a pawn in a dangerous game of international espionage and world domination. Comedy, starring Ben Stiller, Owen Wilson, Will Ferrell, Milla Jovovich, Christine Taylor and David Duchovny.

programme.title: The Natural
programme.desc: A baseball prodigy's dreams of sporting stardom are cut short when he gets shot. Once he has recovered from his injuries, he rejoins his team as a rookie recruit at an age when most players are thinking of retiring - only to enjoy an unexpected run of success. Drama, starring Robert Redford, Glenn Close, Kim Basinger, Robert Duvall and Barbara Hershey.

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing
programme.desc: A woman more interested in one-night stands than true love is forced to reassess her priorities after meeting the man of her dreams. However, when she hears he is getting married, she sets out on a hectic road trip across America to stop the wedding. Romantic comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Christina Applegate, Selma Blair and Thomas Jane.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie Hart is taken off active duty and made the face of the bureau's publicity campaign, but would rather catch crooks than be the focus of media attention - so when her friends are kidnapped, she disobeys orders to run her own undercover investigation with the help of a short-tempered colleague. Comedy sequel, starring Sandra Bullock, Regina King, William Shatner and Heather Burns.

programme.title: 48 Hrs
programme.desc: A hard-bitten cop goes on the trail of two escaped fugitives who killed several of his fellow officers. He needs someone with inside knowledge of the criminals, and is reluctantly forced to temporarily release a fast-talking thief from prison to help him in his investigation. Comedy thriller, starring Nick Nolte, Eddie Murphy and Annette O'Toole.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Three former college friends reunite at the funeral of a mutual acquaintance, who killed herself after her husband left her for a younger woman. Finding themselves in a similar situation, the trio decide to take action and hit their former partners where it hurts most - their finances. Comedy, starring Goldie Hawn, Bette Midler, Diane Keaton, Maggie Smith, Dan Hedaya, Bronson Pinchot and Elizabeth

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: Three men on a stag weekend in Las Vegas wake up after a night of heavy drinking and find they have not only misplaced the groom, but somehow gained a tiger and a baby. Unable to remember the details of the night before, they set about piecing the clues together in the hope of finding their missing friend. Comedy, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Oscar-winning Mikey Madison stars as a sex worker who impulsively marries an oligarch's son, whose family try to get the marriage annulled.

programme.title: Turtles All The Way Down
programme.desc: Anxious teen Aza wants to be a good daughter and friend - but battles an endless barrage of invasive thoughts. Romantic drama.

programme.title: Cicada
programme.desc: As they continue to recover from separate traumatic events, two young men gradually start to fall for each other. Contains reference to child abuse.

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: Oscar-winner with Ryan O'Neal and Ali MacGraw as the young lovers who defy his parents to stay together, only to face tragedy. Heartrending drama. Strong language.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: Kevin Bacon moves to a Midwest town, but finds dancing and music banned by zealous preacher John Lithgow. Foot-tapping 80s favourite. Violence and discriminatory language.

programme.title: Miss You Already
programme.desc: Two best friends have their relationship tested when one of them falls ill with cancer. Drama with Toni Collette and Drew Barrymore.

programme.title: Coach Carter
programme.desc: Samuel L Jackson turns his basketball underdogs into top dogs, but benches the team when he finds out they're flunking in the classroom. Sports drama. Violence/nudity.

programme.title: Nuremberg
programme.desc: A WWII psychiatrist evaluates Nazi leaders before the Nuremberg trials, growing obsessed with understanding evil as he bonds with Hermann Göring.

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Joe Wright's gripping historical drama stars Gary Oldman as Winston Churchill during his turbulent early days as prime minister. With Ben Mendelsohn.

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: Tonya Harding, a competitive ice skater, rises to fame despite her struggles. However, her career begins to go off the rails when her ex-husband re-enters her life.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: On learning he can time travel, Domhnall Gleeson tries to engineer the perfect relationship with Rachel McAdams. Romance from Richard Curtis. Strong language/sex/nudity.

programme.title: May December
programme.desc: A couple start to unravel after welcoming the lead actor in a movie about their notorious romance into their home. Sky Original with Julianne Moore and Natalie Portman.

programme.title: Widow Clicquot

programme.desc: Anxious teen Aza wants to be a good daughter and friend - but battles an endless barrage of invasive thoughts. Romantic drama.

programme.title: Miss You Already
programme.desc: Two best friends have their relationship tested when one of them falls ill with cancer. Drama with Toni Collette and Drew Barrymore.

programme.title: A Mistake
programme.desc: Elizabeth Banks stars as a talented surgeon whose life unravels after an inexperienced colleague makes a fatal mistake. Tense medical drama.

programme.title: Let's Dance
programme.desc: A widowed performer and her former dancing partner fight her wealthy mother-in-law for custody of her son. Timeless musical starring Fred Astaire and Betty Hutton.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: On learning he can time travel, Domhnall Gleeson tries to engineer the perfect relationship with Rachel McAdams. Romance from Richard Curtis. Strong language/sex/nudity.

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: Tonya Harding, a competitive ice skater, rises to fame despite her struggles. However, her career begins to go off the rails when her ex-husband re-enters her life.

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part II
programme.desc: High-kicking karate student Daniel and his mentor Mr Miyagi travel to Japan to settle an old score. Family action sequel with Pat Morita and Ralph Macchio.

programme.title: Harold and The Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can bring anything to life with his magic crayon. But now he has entered the real world, he has a lot to learn.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: A young Peruvian bear travels to London in search of a home. Delightful big-screen adaptation of the beloved books.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: When everyone's favourite marmalade-loving bear is framed, the Brown family must fight to clear his name. Top family sequel with Hugh Grant.

programme.title: Paddington in Peru
programme.desc: Paddington, with the Brown family in tow, returns to Peru to visit his beloved Aunt Lucy, embarking on a thrilling and mysterious adventure.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle Of The Five Armies
programme.desc: The future of Middle-earth hangs is at stake as Peter Jackson's epic trilogy concludes. Martin Freeman stars.

programme.title: Spy Kids
programme.desc: Two kids must rescue their secret agent parents and foil evil Alan Cumming's plans. Supersonic adventure with Antonio Banderas, from director Robert Rodriguez.

programme.title: Charlie And The Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Johnny Depp and Tim Burton team up once more for an update of Roald Dahl's wonderfully wicked tale of greedy kids and an oddball sweet-maker named Willy Wonka.

programme.desc: The little blue critters find themselves hiding out in New York when evil wizard Gargamel chases them out of their village. Family fun. Flashing images.

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: In Middle-earth, a reluctant hobbit begins a treacherous journey to the lair of a dragon. Peter Jackson directs this epic quest.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation Of...

A story of love and repression, fantasy and terror, sex and death, memory and longing. It is at its core a mystery story: a heart-rending investigation i

programme.title: Extraordinary Measures
programme.desc: John Crowley (Brendan Fraser) is a man on the corporate fast-track, with a beautiful wife (Keri Russell) and three children. Just as his career is taking off, he learns that his two youngest kids have a fatal disease. John leaves his job and devotes himself to saving their lives. He joins forces with Dr. Robert Stonehill (Harrison Ford), a brilliant but eccentric scientist. Together they battle th

programme.title: The Substance of Fire
programme.desc: A dictatorial New York publishing magnate (Ron Rifkin) goes into decline after his heirs rebel and take over his company.

programme.title: The Girl in the Pool
programme.desc: A man's life collapses when his mistress is found dead in his pool. Terrified of the consequences and desperate to protect his family, he conceals the truth, triggering a chaotic night that threatens to unravel his perfect life.

programme.title: Marshmallow
programme.desc: A 12-year-old boy starts to see a shadowy figure in the woods after hearing a spooky story at summer camp.

programme.title: Rumours
programme.desc: Leaders of the world's wealthiest democracies gather for the annual G7 summit to draft a provisional statement regarding a global crisis. They soon become spectacles of incompetence, contending with increasingly surreal obstacles as night falls in the misty woods and they realize they are suddenly alone.

programme.title: Confess, Fletch
programme.desc: While investigating a case of stolen paintings, the roguishly charming and endlessly troublesome Fletch becomes the prime suspect in a murder. To prove his innocence, he must sift through a long list of suspects, including his own girlfriend.

programme.title: Heartburn
programme.desc: Rachel Samstat (Meryl Streep), a New York food critic, beds Mark Forman (Jack Nicholson), a Washington, D.C., newspaper columnist. The two fall in love, and Rachel relinquishes her job and relocates to be with a man who views himself as unfit for marriage. They try to build a life together -- literally -- as they struggle with the construction crews renovating their home. When Rachel gets pregnant

programme.title: An Invisible Sign
programme.desc: Mona uses math to overcome her personal problems and teaches her students the same tricks.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: Widow Aurora Greenway (Shirley MacLaine) and her daughter, Emma (Debra Winger), have a strong bond, but Emma marries teacher Flap Horton (Jeff Daniels) against her mother's wishes. When the marriage grows sour due to Flap's cheating, Emma eventually splits from him, returning to her mother, who is involved with a former astronaut (Jack Nicholson). Soon, Emma learns that she has terminal cancer. In

programme.title: Daag: The Fire
programme.desc: Karan learns that his father had committed suicide after he was convicted for a crime he didn't commit. Will he seek revenge? It stars Sanjay Dutt, Chandrachur Singh, Mahima Chaudhry.

programme.title: Darwaza Bandh Rakho
programme.desc: Four men form a gang with a plan of making a quick buck by kidnapping a rich girl for ransom.

programme.title: Ishq
programme.desc: Four lovers from different backgrounds fight family opposition in a blend of comedy, drama, and emotion. Their misadventures highlight love's madness and the joy of rebellion.

programme.title: Hum Kisi Se Kum Nahin
programme.desc: Munna Bhai, a gangster, loves Komal. He wants to marry her, but faces problems. Komal's brother and her boyfriend try to stop him, leading to funny events.

programme.title: Deewana Mastana
programme.desc: Neha, a psychiatrist, is pursued by both Raja, a small-time crook, and Bunnu, a patient. Things take a hilarious turn when the two try to outsmart each other to win Neha's heart.

programme.title: Patiala House
programme.desc: A victim Rishi Kapoor of British racial violence and profiling prevents his son Akshay Kumar from playing cricket for an English team. The film also stars Anushka Sharma.

programme.title: War
programme.desc: Kabir, a secret agent, goes rogue after a mission to catch a terrorist goes awry. However, his boss sends Khalid, another agent and his student, to track him down.

programme.title: Gunday
programme.desc: Two orphaned boys grow into powerful outlaws in 1970s Calcutta. As love and betrayal enter their lives, their bond is tested in this story of friendship, ambition, and rebellion.

programme.title: Fakira
programme.desc: Brothers Ajya and Vijay are separated after their shanty is burned. Later, Ajay is assigned to bring Vijay to justice by a don.

programme.title: Angrezi Medium
programme.desc: Though Champak initially disapproves, he eventually does everything in his power while going through a series of hilarious mishaps to fulfil his daughter's dream of going to London to study further.

programme.title: Mere Yaar Ki Shaadi Hai
programme.desc: Sanjay and Anjali secretly love each other, but Anjali's engagement to Rohit traps them. They must confront their true feelings before it's too late.

programme.title: Humko Deewana Kar Gaye
programme.desc: Two engaged individuals fall for each other while abroad, torn between duty and desire. Their emotional journey reflects love's unpredictability and the courage to follow the heart.

programme.title: Atithi Tum Kab Jaoge
programme.desc: A working couple has an unexpected visitor who does not want to leave.

programme.title: Omg - Oh My God!
programme.desc: Kanji is an atheist whose life takes an ugly turn when an earthquake destroys his antique shop. He does not give up hope and decides to sue God.

programme.title: Tiger Zinda Hai
programme.desc: East Indian agent Tiger teams up with Pakistani agent Zoya to confront a ruthless militant, combining skills and courage across borders to restore peace and justice.
